user.title: Blaueis Gateway
user.description: Connect to a Blaueis HVAC gateway running on your network.

init.title: Blaueis Midea AC
init.description: Configure Follow Me, Display & Buzzer mode default, and (Advanced) glossary overrides. {override_error}

data.run_inventory_scan_now: Run new inventory scan on submit

data_description.follow_me_function_configured: Master availability flag. Tick once you've selected a temperature sensor and reviewed the guards below. While unticked, the on/off switch is hidden from the device card. Unticking force-clears Enabled so the persisted state stays consistent.
data_description.follow_me_function_enabled: Engage state. Same persistent flag as the on/off switch on the device card — change either, the other reflects it on next refresh. Auto-cleared if Configured is unticked.
data_description.follow_me_function_sensor: HA temperature-class sensor the AC will track instead of its internal thermistor. Pick a sensor in the room you actually want the AC to regulate.
data_description.follow_me_function_guard_temp_min: Lower bound for accepted readings (°C). Readings below trigger temp-disable until the sensor recovers. Default −15 °C.
data_description.follow_me_function_guard_temp_max: Upper bound for accepted readings (°C). Readings above trigger temp-disable. Catches the common °F-as-°C misconfiguration (a 72 °F reading reported as 72 trips the default 40 °C guard).
data_description.follow_me_function_safety_timeout: Maximum sensor age in seconds before the reading is considered stale and Follow Me temp-disables. Catches sensors that stop updating without going to 'unavailable'. Default 300 s.
data_description.display_buzzer_mode: Controls the AC display LED and, by extension, the buzzer. Non-enforced lets you control the display freely; Forced modes keep the display in the selected state and the integration re-asserts it if the remote changes it.
data_description.glossary_overrides_yaml: Developer / debugging only — leave empty for normal operation. See the integration README for the override format and examples.
data_description.run_inventory_scan_now: Tick and save to trigger a fresh field-inventory scan. Takes ~10-15 s; reopen Configure afterwards to see the result below. Each scan replaces the single cached entry — no history accumulates.
data_description.latest_field_inventory_display: Read-only preview of the latest scan. Includes a human-readable timestamp comment at the top. Cached on disk and rehydrated after HA restart — re-running a scan replaces this single entry. Select + copy to share.

error.invalid_override: Invalid glossary override — see message in description above.

value_out_of_range.message: {got} is outside the allowed range [{min}, {max}] for {field}.

value_not_in_enum.message: {got} is not one of the allowed values for {field} (allowed: {allowed}).

field_inactive_in_mode.message: {field} cannot be set while operating mode is {mode}.
